findings.summary: example used repeated -Validation flags and -File invocation which break array binding; fixed with comma array and -Command form
allow list intentionally covers both -NoProfile and plain invocation variants

summary: Reviewed config-only diff: settings.json parses, deny rules cover merge/force-push/secrets. Slash commands verified against CLI ValidateSet. CLAUDE.md additive. Review caught two doc bugs in sb-review.md (repeated -Validation flags; -File flattening arrays from bash); both fixed.
